description_long: This is a pair of angular, modern sunglasses featuring a bold geometric frame with sharp, faceted edges. The frame is thick and robust, with a full-rim design that completely encircles the lenses, giving it a futuristic and striking appearance. The lenses are tinted a vivid red, providing a dramatic contrast to the dark, matte frame. The temples are straight and substantial, extending back in a clean, uninterrupted line with squared-off ends. The bridge is integrated into the frame, forming a continuous, angular connection between the two lenses without any visible nose pads. There are no visible embellishments, engravings, or brand logos, emphasizing a minimalist yet edgy urban style.
description: A pair of angular, full-rim sunglasses with bold red lenses and a thick, dark geometric frame. The design is modern and minimalist, with straight temples and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharp, angular frame and the vivid red lenses, with the bridge and full-rim design clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, thick temples and the squared-off ends, with minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame and the continuous, angular connection of the bridge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight, robust temple design and squared-off end.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a bold, angular, and geometric shape with sharp edges and a full-rim structure. It is thick and robust, with straight temples and squared-off ends, giving it a modern, futuristic look without any decorative embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are tinted a vivid, opaque red with uniform coloration and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, integrated part of the frame, forming a continuous angular connection between the lenses without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thick, and squared at the ends, with a clean, minimalist design and no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments.
